summary: Completed end-to-end frontend testing of the ReCell demo (frontend-only, no backend). Tested home, sell flow (all 6 stages incl. deep-link + revalue), buy storefront with filters/search/sort, product detail page, seller dashboard, stores page, header/mobile nav. 0 console errors. All critical flows work; minor data-testid gaps in PDP and Dashboard noted.
action_items: Add data-testid to Product Detail page CTAs: 'pdp-reserve' (Reserve & Pay button) and 'pdp-add-to-cart' (Add to Cart button). They are visible/clickable but lack testids per spec.

Add data-testid to Dashboard root ('dashboard-page') and to stat cards: 'stat-total-mg', 'stat-profit-share', 'stat-avg-resale-time' (currently only 'stat-active-listings' has a testid). Improves automated testability per design guidelines.
critical_code_review_comments: Sell.jsx is ~460 lines and approaches the 700-line guideline — acceptable now, but consider splitting stage components (Brand/Model/Variant/Questionnaire/Otp/Price) into separate files if more logic is added.

Sell.jsx uses a single 'sell-back' testid across multiple stages — if multiple BackBars are ever rendered simultaneously, selectors will collide. Currently only one is rendered at a time, so non-blocking.
Sell.jsx 'questionnaire' step 4 accessory section: only 1 'yes' button was rendered (data driven). Verify mockData QUESTIONNAIRE_STEPS[3] actually represents accessories as designed.
Use of inline style={{fontFamily: ...}} repeated extensively — consider Tailwind font-family utilities or CSS variables for consistency and to reduce repetition.
No error boundary on any route — if mockData changes break a page (e.g., unknown brand id with no models), the whole app could blank instead of showing a graceful error.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only React demo. Public URL: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. All routes verified: /, /sell (incl. /sell?brand=apple deep-link), /buy, /buy/:id, /dashboard, /stores. Verified data-testids exist for: home-page, site-header, site-footer, brand-selector-grid, brand-card-{id} (apple,samsung,oneplus,xiaomi,google,sony), nav-{sell,buy,dashboard,stores}, mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-menu, sell-page, sell-stage-{brand,model,variant,otp,price}, device-condition-form, sell-brand-{id}, sell-model-{id}, sell-picker-{storage,ram}, sell-{storage,ram}-{value} (e.g. sell-storage-256gb, sell-ram-8gb), sell-get-exact-value, sell-q-prev, sell-q-next, question-{id}, answer-{qid}-{yes|no}, sell-mobile-input, sell-send-otp, sell-otp-input, sell-verify-otp, sell-now-cta, sell-revalue-cta, sell-restart, sell-back, sell-stepbar, buy-page, buy-search-input, buy-filters, buy-filter-brand-{name}, buy-filter-grade-{slug}, buy-sort, buy-result-count, buy-storefront-grid, buy-card-{id}, buy-empty, product-detail-page, pdp-back, stores-page. MISSING testids reported in action_items.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failures encountered. All 6 sell-flow stages worked, deep-link routing worked (initialBrand resolves from ?brand= and sets stage to 'model'), filters/search/sort on /buy correctly recompute the grid (8→3 Apple, 8→2 Like New, 8→3 'iphone' search), and the Revalue CTA correctly resets qStep to 0 and moves stage back to 'questionnaire'.
